title: Feta and Italian Carbonara Pasta
description: A classic Italian pasta dish with a twist, adding feta cheese for a tangy flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the carbonara cheese sauce to the skillet and stir until melted.
Add the crumbled feta cheese to the skillet and stir until combined.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet and toss with the cheese sauce until well coated.
Add the briny olives and italian seasoning to the skillet and toss to combine.
Season with black pepper to taste.
